item.title: Against extraordinary odds: A life saved more than once
New technology could improve donor liver evaluation before transplantation
Mayo Clinic performs its first dual mechanical heart pump procedure, giving father of 2 a path to transplant (VIDEO)
Researchers identify new kidney pathway with help from 1940s-era drug, may improve polycystic kidney disease treatment (VIDEO)
Mayo Clinic study finds new post-liver transplant protocol results in 0% heavy alcohol relapse rate
A mom’s MS diagnosis led to treatment that put the disease on pause (VIDEO)
Mother refuses to give up on son and finds a way forward (VIDEO)
Kidney-pancreas transplant gives tap dancer new life without diabetes (VIDEO)
Mayo Clinic study finds remote monitoring may detect early complications, reduce burden for lung transplant patients
A routine screening reveals stage 4 cancer, leads to life-changing liver transplant (VIDEO)
